title: Reacting masses and volumes (of solutions and gases)
summary: 9701 AS — mole ratios, gas volumes, titrations, and limiting reagents.
learningObjectives: Use molar gas volume at rtp.

simpleExplanation.title: From equation to numbers
simpleExplanation.summary: Balanced equations give mole ratios. Convert between mass, moles, gas volume, and solution concentration.
steps: Gas: V = n × 24 dm³ at rtp.

sections.content: **Reacting quantities** (2.4) is core **AS calculation** work. Show **clear mole ratio steps** every time.
